description: Designed poster. The background is a full-bleed color photograph of a commercial car wash interior: tall blue, teal, and green hanging cloth brush rollers fill the left side, while in the right-center two men in dark shirts and work pants (one wearing a hat) hand-wash a dark car with a pressure-spray hose; an overhead conveyor track and a yellow awning are visible, and the wet tiled floor in the foreground reflects light. Layered over the left side in large condensed bold capitals is the text, with 'IT'S TIME TO' in white and 'GET RIGHT WITH THE LAW' in distressed bright yellow, with 'LAW' rendered very large. Bottom left in white is the URL 'ICE.gov/IMAGE'; bottom right shows the circular blue-and-white DHS seal beside the white wordmark 'ICE'.
notable_text: IT'S TIME TO GET RIGHT WITH THE LAW; ICE.gov/IMAGE; ICE
